arts.ttl: Lee Carsley confirms another England injury as debutant could step up for Ireland clash
arts.sum: England take on the Republic of Ireland at Wembley on Sunday evening but the Three Lions squad has been beset by a long list of injuries ahead of the game with another announced

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: England withdrawals could harm squad’s togetherness
arts.sum: The England captain has again highlighted the importance of players turning up for international duty.

arts.ttl: Kane warns of fragile culture after withdrawals row
arts.sum: Harry Kane has warned that the England team's culture "takes a long time to build and maybe not so long to lose" and called on the senior players to help maintain a positive feel around the camp.

arts.ttl: Ezri Konsa out of England squad: Who will replace Aston Villa man against Ireland?
arts.sum: England interim head coach Lee Carsley confirms that Ezri Konsa has withdrawn from the squad ahead of Sunday's clash with the Republic of Ireland due to injury.

arts.ttl: New generation of England players expect to win - Carsley
arts.sum: Interim England boss Lee Carsley says the younger players who starred in the 3-0 victory over Greece are "a generation that expect to win" having achieved success at under-21 level.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley prioritises Nations League promotion as Harry Kane walks back criticism on withdrawals
arts.sum: England host the Republic of Ireland at Wembley looking to secure top spot in Group B2

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer shows true colours as he admits what he did with Man City medals
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has already won more trophies than most players do in their careers, but that does not mean the Chelsea midfielder is constantly looking back at his achievements

arts.ttl: England vs Republic of Ireland: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Three Lions take on Irish in Lee Carsley’s final game in charge

arts.ttl: England at risk of setting unwanted losing record in Nations League showdown with Ireland
arts.sum: England could set an unwanted home losing record when they host the Republic of Ireland in Sunday's UEFA Nations League showdown.

arts.ttl: Goal machine, the 'next Bukayo Saka' and the 'next Wayne Rooney': Three 16-year-olds who could become superstars at Man United
arts.sum: Sports Mole picks out three 16-year-olds at Manchester United who could be on the radar of first-team head coach Ruben Amorim.
